prompt: Blocker proxy spot: choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when range and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits because the Ks blocker removes strong continues and gives this pressure line real fold equity.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is better here because the blocker removes some strong continues from villain's range and makes fold equity more believable. With pressure plus that card-removal edge, aggression earns more than a passive line.
